summary: Completed comprehensive SEO & lead capture testing for static HTML site. Verified JSON-LD structured data, meta tags, analytics placeholders, lead capture functionality, multi-channel CTAs, individual property pages, and SEO files accessibility.

minor_issues.issue: Console warning about invalid PixelID - placeholder 'PIXEL_ID' not replaced with actual ID
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, just console warning

minor_issues.issue: Exit intent functionality script not found in document
minor_issues.impact: Exit intent popup may not trigger on mouse leave

passed_tests: Homepage loads with proper SEO title and meta tags
JSON-LD structured data present (LodgingBusiness and Apartment schemas)
All 11 images have descriptive alt text (0 missing alt tags)
Individual property pages accessible: xanadu-922.html, xanadu-313.html, xanadu-310.html
Property pages have unique SEO-optimized titles with keywords
Property pages contain Apartment JSON-LD schema
Multi-channel contact section (WhatsApp, Phone, Email, Instagram)
WhatsApp links contain UTM parameters (utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign)
Lead capture modal popup triggers successfully
Property card links navigate correctly to individual pages
Back button on property pages returns to homepage
robots.txt accessible and allows crawling with sitemap reference
